name: multi-company-portal
description: Multi-company login portal that hosts the FinTrack financial app per tenant, with master/staff accounts.
whatsNew: Dates now read in a clearer day-month-year style everywhere, e.g. 26-Jun-26, with short month names (Jun, Jul, Aug).
Times and log timestamps now include seconds, and the top-bar clock ticks live every second.
The Members page lists the newest member first, with a Sort menu; every entry pop-up shows the selected bank's balance.
